commands.developerBuild: replace with command that performs and awaits one developer build
commands.developerReload: replace with command that performs and awaits one developer reload
commands.launch: replace with command that launches the release dashboard
commands.waitForDashboard: replace with command that waits until the dashboard is usable
commands.processIds: replace with command that prints all product PIDs
commands.closeDashboard: replace with command that closes the dashboard and awaits renderer destruction
commands.openDashboard: replace with command that reopens the dashboard
commands.triggerReconnect: replace with command that interrupts the service connection
commands.waitForReconnect: replace with command that awaits a recovered current snapshot
commands.stop: replace with command that stops every process started for measurement
